items.title: Trump revokes landmark ruling that greenhouse gases endanger public health
items.dek: The White House calls it the largest deregulation in US history, but environmentalists say it will prove costly for Americans.
items.body: The White House calls it the largest deregulation in US history, but environmentalists say it will prove costly for Americans.

items.title: Man arrested after hucking jerky, shouting Bible verses in front of school: police

items.title: Kenya's border with Somalia set to re-open after almost 15 years
items.dek: Somali Islamist militant group al-Shabab has staged several attacks in Kenya, prompting the border to be closed.
items.body: Somali Islamist militant group al-Shabab has staged several attacks in Kenya, prompting the border to be closed.
items.author: IriLine Desk
